hazards.description: [code review] Destructive git checkout/clean in run.sh escalation path

shots.title: Continuous loop and parallel sprint runners

hazards.description: [code review] Failure counter reset logic broken in continuous.sh
[code review] jq not validated in parallel.sh preflight
[code review] git branch -D unsafe for unmerged branches in parallel.sh

bunker_locations: Shell scripts need careful quoting for paths with spaces — run.sh uses double-quotes throughout for safety
Parallel runner must detect module overlap before launching worktrees — falls back to sequential if overlap found
yardage_book_updates: slope-loop/run.sh: tiered model selection (Qwen local for putter/wedge/short_iron, MiniMax M2.5 API for long_iron/driver), auto-escalation on local failure, --dry-run flag
slope-loop/continuous.sh: sprint loop with backlog auto-regeneration, default max 10 sprints, 3-failure circuit breaker
slope-loop/parallel.sh: two-stream parallel runner with git worktrees, module overlap detection
skills/slope-sprint-workflow/SKILL.md and skills/slope-performance-analysis/SKILL.md follow Agent Skills spec with YAML frontmatter
course_management_notes: Clean sprint — all 4 deliverables landed without issues
run.sh includes per-ticket JSONL tracking for model-selector.ts consumption in future sprints
Skills are portable across any agent that supports the Agent Skills spec — not SLOPE-specific tooling
